scripts.check: npm run check:scripts && npm run check:pre-mvp && npm run check:docs && npm run check:workspace && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.check:scripts: node --check scripts/check-docs.mjs && node --check scripts/check-workspace.mjs && node --check scripts/dev/setup-codex-links.mjs
scripts.check:pre-mvp: node --check apps/pre-mvp/server.mjs && node --check apps/pre-mvp/public/app.js && node --check apps/pre-mvp/public/db.js && node --check apps/pre-mvp/public/analysis.worker.js
